title: Fix 403 error when analyzing mobile screenshots

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the HTTP 403 error ('Erro na análise: 403') that occurs when users upload chart images from mobile devices. Review the API request format in frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to ensure mobile screenshots are properly encoded and sent with correct headers and authentication.

quotes: da esse erro na analise, quando mando print do celular

acceptanceCriteria: Mobile screenshots can be analyzed without returning 403 errors
Error handling provides clear Portuguese feedback when API authentication fails
API requests include all required headers and authentication tokens for the Google Gemini Vision endpoint

requirements.text: Add diagnostic logging to frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to capture request details (headers, payload size, content type) when API calls fail with 403 status, helping identify authentication or permission issues specific to mobile image uploads.
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs display request metadata when 403 errors occur
Error messages distinguish between authentication failures and other API errors
Logs help identify differences between desktop and mobile image upload requests

requirements.text: Verify that the Google Gemini Vision API key in frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts has the necessary permissions and quotas enabled for image analysis requests. Add validation to check if the API key is properly configured before sending requests.
acceptanceCriteria: API key validation prevents requests when credentials are missing or invalid
User receives clear Portuguese error message ('Chave de API não configurada') if API key is missing
Configuration documentation includes steps to verify API key permissions

requirements.text: Ensure mobile screenshot images are properly converted to the correct format and size before being sent to the Google Gemini Vision API. Add image preprocessing in frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to handle different mobile screenshot formats and dimensions that may trigger 403 errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Images larger than API limits are automatically resized while preserving aspect ratio
HEIC/HEIF formats from iOS devices are converted to JPEG before upload
Image preprocessing maintains sufficient quality for chart analysis

constraints: Must maintain compatibility with existing Google Gemini Vision API integration
Error messages must remain in Portuguese (Brazil)
Do not modify backend/main.mo or other immutable frontend paths
nonGoals: Switching to a different AI provider
Changing the overall API integration architecture
Modifying the UI/UX of error display screens
